summary: Iteration 5 (per-session SSG pages + hero CTAs on conference detail) tested end-to-end. Backend regression: 23/23 pytest pass (5.63s). SSG: sampled 6 real session slugs derived from conference data using the published slug algo (lowercase + [^a-z0-9]+ to '-' + trim + slice 120) — all 6 returned 200; invalid slug returned 404. Frontend conference detail (logged-out): conference-quick-actions present with cta-view-agenda (href=#agenda), cta-browse-speakers (text 'Browse Speakers · 39'), cta-take-notes-signin (href=/admin/login). 44 session-open-* buttons (matches non-structural session count); first href correctly /notebook/conference/seo-week-2026/sessions/monday-april-27-2026-8-45-am-welcome-opening-remarks. 39 speaker-grid cards still link to /notebook/conference/speakers/{slug} (regression unchanged). Grid view tiles updated correctly: 40 grid-speaker- tiles, first href is /notebook/conference/seo-week-2026/sessions/{...} (NOT /speakers/...). Logged-in admin: cta-take-notes-authed renders, cta-take-notes-signin gone, inline session-notes-toggle quick-note coexists with session-open btn on every card. Session detail (logged-out, welcome-opening-remarks): session-detail / session-title='Welcome & Opening Remarks' / session-speaker-photo IMG loaded (Mike King PNG, complete && naturalWidth>0) / session-open-speaker-profile present / Abstract section present / 'Notes locked' card with Sign in CTA visible / prev+next buttons present. Session detail (logged-in admin): session-note-editor-full + session-note-textarea rows=16 + publish-toggle + takeaway input + 3 status pills present. Autosave: typing 'TEST_E2E_SESSION_PAGE notes for iter5' triggered PUT /api/notebook/notes/seo-week-2026/{sid} 200 with is_public:false. Clicking publish-toggle triggered second PUT 200 with is_public:true. After clearing mm_admin_token + reloading, the SAME logged-out URL renders 1 session-public-note-block containing the test text. Cleanup: re-login + DELETE returned 200. Prev/Next: next href = /sessions/monday-april-27-2026-9-00-am-the-invisible-converged-web... ; prev href = /sessions/monday-april-27-2026-8-00-am-registration-coffee. Speaker profile regression: /notebook/conference/speakers/mike-king still 200.
action_items: Optional: log a console hint or expose a public list of pre-rendered session slugs (e.g. a sitemap.xml entry per session) — would help future testers spot-check without re-deriving slugs from conferences.ts.

Optional: UI form login (POST /api/auth/login from the form) was observed to redirect successfully but leaving localStorage briefly empty in one test run; the fetch-based login worked reliably. Worth a quick look at whether the form's setItem('mm_admin_token', ...) happens BEFORE router.push('/admin'). Not a functional bug — fetch-login + manual token write produced consistent results — but explains some flakiness in earlier iter logs.

Optional: clicking session-next from a logged-out page sometimes lands back on the original URL after wait_for_load_state(networkidle) on the preview deployment (likely a CDN/Next.js prefetch quirk). The HREF is correct, direct navigation to the next slug returns 200, so functionality is fine.
critical_code_review_comments: generateStaticParams in /app/frontend/app/notebook/conference/[slug]/sessions/[sessionId]/page.tsx correctly enumerates ALL sessions across ALL conferences and uses dynamicParams=false → invalid slugs are guaranteed 404 at the router level (verified).
Slug derivation matches between page.tsx (server) and ConferenceDetail.tsx (client links) — confirmed by clicking session-open and grid-speaker tiles and landing on real 200 pages.

Hero CTAs correctly conditionally render cta-take-notes-signin vs cta-take-notes-authed based on token presence; the inline 'Quick note' toggle is preserved alongside per-session 'Open session' button (no regression of iter3 inline quick-note flow).

Grid view tile linkage update (speaker-profile → session-detail) is consistent: GridSpeakerCard now requires conferenceSlug prop and emits /sessions/{anchor} hrefs; speaker grid cards (different component) continue to link to /speakers/{slug} — behaviour matches spec.

SessionDetail handles three states cleanly: logged-out + no published note (Notes locked card with sign-in), logged-out + published note (session-public-note-block render), logged-in (full editor with autosave + publish toggle + takeaway).
_id correctly excluded from all API responses; backend PUT preserves existing is_public when omitted (verified in 23-test pytest suite).
Backend untouched in this iteration — pytest 23/23 confirms zero regression.

success_rate.frontend: 100% — every spec'd flow passes (SSG x6 + invalid 404, hero CTAs logged-out + logged-in, 44 session-open links, 39-cards regression, grid view tile linkage, session detail logged-out skeleton, session detail logged-in editor + autosave + publish, public-note render after logout, prev/next navigation hrefs, speaker profile regression)

seed_data_creation: E2E publish flow created a real conference_notes record for session_id=monday-april-27-2026-8-45-am-welcome-opening-remarks then DELETEd it (200). No residual test data left in MongoDB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 5 added: (1) per-session SSG dynamic route at /notebook/conference/[slug]/sessions/[sessionId]/page.tsx with generateStaticParams enumerating every (conference, day, session) tuple — slug = lowercase(`${dayDate}__${start}__${title}`).replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g,'-').replace(/^-|-$/g,'').slice(0,120); dynamicParams=false → invalid slugs 404. (2) SessionDetail view (/app/frontend/src/views/SessionDetail.tsx) with NoteEditorFull (rows=16) + publish-toggle + takeaway input + status pills + prev/next nav (testids session-prev / session-next) + Notes locked card for logged-out users + inline session-public-note-block render. (3) ConferenceDetail hero CTAs: conference-quick-actions container with cta-view-agenda (href=#agenda), cta-browse-speakers (text contains '39'), cta-take-notes-signin (logged-out → /admin/login) / cta-take-notes-authed (logged-in). (4) Each non-structural session card now has session-open-{anchor} link — 44 total. (5) Grid view GridSpeakerCard links updated from /speakers/{slug} to /sessions/{anchor} (uses conferenceSlug prop). Speaker grid cards (different component) UNCHANGED, still 39 cards linking to /speakers/{slug}. Backend untouched. The session page calls /api/notebook/notes/public/{conference_slug} (no auth) on mount and /api/notebook/notes/{conference_slug}/{session_id} (auth) when logged in. UI form login may have intermittent localStorage timing; preferred test-time login is fetch /api/auth/login → write token to localStorage manually. Backend pytest 23/23 in /app/backend/tests/test_conference_notebook.py.

tests_executed.backend_pytest: 23/23 PASSED in 5.63s — TestNotebookAuthGating(4), TestNotebookCrud(6), TestIsPublicAndPublicEndpoint(7), TestRegressionSmoke(6). XML at /app/test_reports/pytest/iteration_5_notebook.xml.
tests_executed.frontend_ssg_curl: 5 sample sessions derived from conference data + 1 pre-conf session (sunday-april-26-2026-3-00-pm-early-registration) all returned 200; 1 invalid slug 'totally-fake-slug-xyz-2026' returned 404. Spec asked for 5 sample 200s + 1 invalid 404 — delivered.
tests_executed.frontend_playwright_logged_out_conf: conference-quick-actions OK; cta-view-agenda href=#agenda; cta-browse-speakers text='Browse Speakers · 39'; cta-take-notes-signin href=/admin/login; cta-take-notes-authed ABSENT; 44 session-open-* buttons found; 39 conference-speaker-* cards in speakers grid; grid view shows 40 grid-speaker- tiles, first href links to /sessions/{...}.
tests_executed.frontend_playwright_logged_in_conf: Token POST→localStorage. Reload conference page: cta-take-notes-authed PRESENT, cta-take-notes-signin ABSENT, inline session-notes-toggle still YES, session-open btn next to it YES.
tests_executed.frontend_playwright_logged_out_session: session-detail OK; session-title='Welcome & Opening Remarks'; speaker-photo IMG loaded with Mike King's seoweek.org PNG (complete && naturalWidth>0); session-open-speaker-profile OK; Abstract section present; Notes locked + Sign in CTA visible; session-prev + session-next present; 0 public-note blocks (correct, no published note at start).
tests_executed.frontend_playwright_logged_in_session: session-note-editor-full OK; textarea rows=16; publish-toggle OK; 3 status-pill-ish elements; takeaway input OK. Typed 'TEST_E2E_SESSION_PAGE notes for iter5' → 1 PUT 200 with is_public:false. Click publish-toggle → 2nd PUT 200 with is_public:true.
tests_executed.frontend_playwright_publish_visibility: Removed mm_admin_token + reloaded same URL. 1 session-public-note-block rendered, contains TEST_E2E_SESSION_PAGE notes for iter5. Cleanup: fetch login 200 + DELETE /api/notebook/notes/seo-week-2026/{sid} returned 200.
tests_executed.frontend_playwright_prev_next: session-next href=/notebook/conference/seo-week-2026/sessions/monday-april-27-2026-9-00-am-the-invisible-converged-web-architecting-visibility-for-the-ai-economy ; session-prev href=/notebook/conference/seo-week-2026/sessions/monday-april-27-2026-8-00-am-registration-coffee. Direct curl to next URL = 200 (already verified in SSG sample).
tests_executed.regression_speaker_profile: /notebook/conference/speakers/mike-king returns 200; 39 unique /notebook/conference/speakers/{slug} hrefs in conference detail HTML.
